notes.create-first: Click + to create your first note
settings.syncEnabled.label: Enable GitHub Gist sync
settings.syncEnabled.desc: Automatically sync notes to a private gist after changes.
settings.githubToken.label: GitHub Token
settings.githubToken.desc: Personal access token with gist permission.
settings.githubToken.help: The plugin creates or reuses a private gist named `noctalia-sticky-notes`. Each note is stored as one file whose filename is the note id.
sync.errors.missing-token: GitHub token is required before syncing.
